text: Here in this modern, brightly-lit corridor, my attention is drawn to the enclosed glass room ahead, washed in violet light. I feel a sense of curiosity and mild alienation—the setting is clean and organized, but also a bit sterile and impersonal. There is a sense of anticipation, as if something innovative or collaborative is brewing within those glass walls, but from here, I remain an outsider looking in, not yet a participant in whatever is unfolding.
